_comment: P4 CHAIN-AWARE demo: a public VPS FRONT edge that forwards ~3 vhosts DOWNSTREAM to the home edge, which does the real per-host routing + auth. The front names downstream_edge=home (+ downstream_address) so crenel FOLLOWS THROUGH: status shows each forwarded host's real downstream backend + the auth OBSERVED there (vault -> Authelia; books/git -> open), and audit flags the open ones by OBSERVATION while NOT crying wolf on vault. Both edges are in-process fakes (reset per run). Try: crenel status -config examples/settings-chain-p4.json ; crenel audit -config examples/settings-chain-p4.json
